data.title: Update project docs to reflect implementation-plan re-invocation safety
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Update CLAUDE.md, design notes, and relevant documentation to reflect the new re-invocation guard, REPLAN_ESCALATE signal, cascade protocol, and epic validation routing.
**Why**: Future agents need accurate awareness of the re-invocation safety mechanics to avoid bypassing the guard or misinterpreting the REPLAN_ESCALATE signal.
**Scope**:
- IN: CLAUDE.md architecture section (re-invocation guard, REPLAN_ESCALATE, cascade protocol), output contract docs, config key documentation
- OUT: Sprint detection docs (separate epic 9d3e-957d)

## Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, CLAUDE.md documents the re-invocation guard behavior, REPLAN_ESCALATE signal format, cascade protocol, and sprint.max_replan_cycles config key
  ← Satisfies: all 4 success criteria (documentation layer)

## Escalation Policy
**Escalation policy**: Escalate to the user whenever you do not have high confidence in your understanding of the work, approach, or intent. "High confidence" means clear evidence from the codebase or ticket context — not inference or reasonable assumption. When in doubt, stop and ask rather than guess.
